name: retinue
description: Codex plugin for running local coding agents as controllable subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Run local coding agents as Codex subagents.
interface.longDescription: Retinue exposes local MCP tools for spawning, waiting for, closing, and handling permissions for controllable Codex subagents. The default 0.2.0 plugin route uses OpenCode on localhost with its explore agent. Claude Code and Kilo are available through deployment configuration; provider, model, login, and permission policy stay in the selected backend runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use Retinue to spawn an OpenCode explore subagent.
Wait for a Retinue subagent result.
